Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1036 "GATESOFDAWN-0700-1036" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0700 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Gates of Dawn.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0700 which resets the TI variable at $A0 to zero before starting the game. The ensures the game always starts the same as the original.
